pr.title: Add editorconfig and github action check
pr.author: r-burns

summary: Added repository-wide EditorConfig settings and a GitHub Actions workflow that checks changed PR files with editorconfig-checker. The PR also updated the Makefile to use tabs in conditional blocks so it complies with the new Makefile-specific EditorConfig rule. The workflow was copied/adapted from nixpkgs, pinned to a nixpkgs commit for editorconfig-checker 2.4.0, and intentionally runs on pull_request_target while checking out the PR merge ref. Discussion focused on avoiding indentation false positives for YAML, clang-format, Makefile syntax, and existing asm/gas whitespace; broader whitespace cleanup was split into a follow-up PR.
what_changed: Added a top-level .editorconfig with root = true and default settings: spaces, indent_size 4, LF endings, final newline, trailing whitespace trimming, and utf-8 charset.
Added .editorconfig overrides for YAML and .clang-format files to use 2-space indentation.
Added a Makefile-specific .editorconfig override requiring tab indentation.
Added a .sha1 override disabling final-newline insertion.
Added a GitHub Actions workflow named "Checking EditorConfig" under .github/workflows/editorconfig.yml.
The workflow runs on pull_request_target for the doldecomp repository owner unless the PR title contains [skip editorconfig].

The workflow uses the GitHub API to collect changed PR files excluding removed files, checks out refs/pull/<number>/merge, installs Nix from a pinned nixpkgs archive, installs editorconfig-checker, and checks only the changed files.
The editorconfig-checker invocation uses -disable-indent-size, reducing indentation-size enforcement friction while retaining other EditorConfig checks.
Updated the Makefile by replacing leading two-space indentation in several conditional bodies with tabs to match the new Makefile rule.
smart_moves: Reused a GitHub Action design from nixpkgs, justified by prior hardening and proven performance on a large repository instead of inventing a bespoke checker from scratch.
Pinned nixpkgs to a specific archive commit so editorconfig-checker availability/version would not unexpectedly break the workflow.
Checked only changed files from the PR instead of the entire repository, making enforcement incremental and practical for an existing codebase with historical whitespace issues.
Used editorconfig-checker -disable-indent-size to avoid making indentation-size disagreements block unrelated work immediately.
Added targeted .editorconfig exceptions for file types with known formatting conventions: YAML/.clang-format at 2 spaces, Makefile tabs, and .sha1 files without final newline.
Split broad whitespace normalization into a separate follow-up rather than combining large mechanical reformatting with CI/tooling setup.
decomp_lessons: For decomp repositories with mixed legacy source, asm, generated metadata, and build scripts, introduce formatting enforcement incrementally and scope CI to changed files.
Makefile indentation is semantically important; use an explicit EditorConfig override for Makefile tab indentation rather than relying on repository defaults.
Asm/gas files may contain mixed historical spaces and tabs; reviewers should decide whether to normalize them separately or configure the checker to avoid blocking progress.
Repository-wide whitespace policy can reduce noisy formatting churn in future decomp PRs, but initial adoption may require a cleanup pass before strict enforcement is safe.
CI checks that depend on PR file lists may not work as simple branch push checks; this workflow used the pull request API and was therefore PR-oriented.
naming_conventions: The workflow supports a PR-title opt-out marker: [skip editorconfig].
Changed PR file list is stored at $HOME/changed_files.
EditorConfig section patterns used include [*], [{*.yml,.clang-format}], [Makefile], and [*.sha1].
assembly_or_matching_tactics: No direct code matching or assembly decompilation tactic was introduced.

The relevant matching-adjacent tactic was to avoid making existing asm/gas indentation immediately blocking; review discussed either allowing mixed indentation in .s files or replacing tabs with spaces in a separate cleanup.
Using -disable-indent-size prevented indentation-size issues from becoming a widespread matching/decomp workflow blocker while still enforcing other whitespace rules.

review_feedback.author: ribbanya
review_feedback.feedback: Asked whether the default EditorConfig settings would cause problems for yml and gas/asm files.

review_feedback.author: r-burns
review_feedback.feedback: Explained that -disable-indent-size avoids some indentation problems and proposed adding a special case for 2-space YAML indentation.

review_feedback.author: ribbanya
review_feedback.feedback: Suggested combining YAML and .clang-format in the 2-space override pattern: [*.yml,.clang-format].

review_feedback.author: r-burns
review_feedback.feedback: Noted substantial mixed spaces/tabs in asm and considered specifying that either indentation style was acceptable in .s files.

review_feedback.author: ribbanya
review_feedback.feedback: Preferred replacing all tabs with spaces, either in this PR or a separate PR.

review_feedback.author: r-burns
review_feedback.feedback: Agreed to issue a separate whitespace-change PR.

review_feedback.author: ribbanya
review_feedback.feedback: Asked whether adding a push-to-master trigger would help test the action before merge.

review_feedback.author: r-burns
review_feedback.feedback: Clarified that the action uses the pull request API to retrieve changed files, so running it on a normal branch push would not work; it was tested on a PR to the author's fork.

follow_up_queries: Find PR #647 to inspect the separate whitespace cleanup that resolved existing EditorConfig violations.
Search for later changes to .editorconfig involving .s, asm, or gas files.
Search for later updates to .github/workflows/editorconfig.yml to see whether pull_request_target, nixpkgs pinning, or editorconfig-checker flags changed.
Search for CI failures or review comments mentioning [skip editorconfig] or disable-indent-size.
